recommendations.title: A Haunted House 2
recommendations.overview: After exorcising the demons of his ex, Malcolm starts afresh with his new girlfriend and her two children. After moving into their dream home, Malcolm is once again plagued by bizarre paranormal events.

recommendations.title: Sextuplets
recommendations.overview: Father-to-be Alan is shocked to learn that he was born a sextuplet. With his newfound brother Russell riding shotgun, the duo sets out on a hilarious journey to reunite with their remaining long-lost siblings.

recommendations.title: Fifty Shades of Black
recommendations.overview: An inexperienced college student meets a wealthy businessman whose sexual practices put a strain on their relationship.

recommendations.title: A Haunted House
recommendations.overview: Malcolm and Kisha move into their dream home, but soon learn a demon also resides there. When Kisha becomes possessed, Malcolm - determined to keep his sex life on track - turns to a priest, a psychic, and a team of ghost-busters for help in this spo

recommendations.title: Big
recommendations.overview: When a young boy makes a wish at a carnival machine to be big—he wakes up the following morning to find that it has been granted and his body has grown older overnight. But he is still the same 13-year-old boy inside. Now he must learn how to cope wi

recommendations.title: If I Were a Boy
recommendations.overview: Jeanne wakes up one morning and her life is about to take a funny turn, at first sight nothing has changed in her - to a small detail.

recommendations.title: The Miracle of Morgan's Creek
recommendations.overview: A small-town girl with a soft spot for American soldiers wakes up the morning after a wild farewell party for the troops to find that she married someone she can't remember.

recommendations.title: Long Story Short

recommendations.title: Before I Fall
recommendations.overview: Samantha Kingston has everything. Then, everything changes. After one fateful night, she wakes up with no future at all. Trapped into reliving the same day over and over, she begins to question just how perfect her life really was.

recommendations.title: Vai Que Dá Certo
recommendations.overview: 5 friends have a plan to rob a transporter that can change their lives.
